prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Data/comm & security, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: plenum vs. riser cable in wrong space. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: TIA-568, NEC 800. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Data/comm & security (residential job)
